title: AAICLAS Security Screener Vacancy 2026, Apply Online, Notification Out -
organization: AAI Cargo Logistics & Allied Services Company Limited (AAICLAS)
how_to_apply: Eligible/Interested candidates can apply using the link given below. Visit the official website https://aaiclas.aero/ Find and click the “Recruitment Link” or “Apply Online” link on the homepage. First, register – enter your name, email, mobile number, and password. After registering, log in and focus on the application form—specifically, the personal details, qualifications, and selection of the position. jobs_info: AAICLAS Security Screener Vacancy 2026: AAI Cargo Logistics & Allied Services Company Limited (AAICLAS) has issued a notification for the position of Security Screener (Fresher). The recruitment drive comprises 158 vacancies. All eligible and interested candidates are advised to carefully read the official notification and apply before 08-06-2026, the last Date. All relevant information regarding the AAICLAS Security Screener Vacancy 2026 recruitment is provided below.
